snippet.title: Vivo X300 vs iPhone 17 Pro vs Xiaomi 17 Pro: The BEST Compact Phone of 2025?
snippet.description:

I got my hands on the three most hyped small flagships on the market—the Vivo X300, the iPhone 17 Pro, and the Xiaomi 17 Pro—to settle the debate once and for all. In this comparison, we'll find out:

🎬 Video King: Which one shoots the smoothest, cleanest 4K video that's ready to post right away?

snippet.title: I Put the iPhone 17 Pro Under a Microscope (And Found This...)
snippet.description:
Ever wondered what your phone looks like under high magnification? This video takes you under the microscope to reveal hidden dust, machining marks, and design tolerances Apple doesn’t advertise. From lens coatings to USB-C port engravings, we explore every detail with extreme macro and stereoscopic depth. It’s a deep dive into the invisible world of precision manufacturing.

00:00 Intro (Telephoto lens)
01:57 Ultrawide lens
02:10 Main camera lens
02:25 Flash light diffuser
02:30 Rear microphone
02:45 LiDAR Scanner
02:52 Action button
03:03 Camera button
03:15 Bottom speaker
03:25 Pentalobe screw
03:32 USB-C port
03:43 Ear speaker
03:51 Front camera lens
03:59 Display

MacroLab3D is dedicated to stereoscopic macro. 3D in my name refers to stereoscopy, not CGI. This is all real mother nature creations, not AI. 
FAQ:
•  Why the shaking: On this channel everything stays still during the photo session, and only camera moves. I am adding the wiggling to improve your depth and form perception on a flat screen. This is a known effect called "Wiggle stereoscopy" and is the main feature of this project.
•  Camera: This is a custom-assembled industrial microscope that I built over the course of this project using available parts. This is not just about a camera or lens. This is macro photography with wiggling.

Join the 1X Members area to support MacroLab3D's further developments.

snippet.title: iPhone 14 Pro vs iPhone 17 Pro: Watch THIS Before You BUY or UPGRADE
snippet.description:
Are you still rocking the iPhone 14 Pro in 2025? It's been three years, and it's still an amazing phone. But with the new iPhone 17 Pro out, is now finally the time to upgrade?

In this video, I compare my Gold iPhone 14 Pro (with 81% battery health) running iOS 26 against my new daily driver, the Silver iPhone 17 Pro. We'll look at the massive performance jump with the A19 Pro chip and 12GB RAM , the new unibody aluminum design (and 'scratchgate' ), the 3000-nit display , and the insane new triple 48MP camera system.   

We also discuss if the 14 Pro still feels 'Pro' on the new iOS 26 with its "Liquid Glass" design  and why the lack of Apple Intelligence  might not be a dealbreaker. If you're on the fence, this is the video for you.   

IN THIS VIDEO: 
The Big Question: 14 Pro vs 17 Pro 
My Setup (Why I have both phones) 
Design: Stainless Steel vs "Scratchgate" Aluminum  
iPhone 14 Pro vs iPhone 17 Pro Performance: A16 (6GB) vs A19 (12GB)  
iPhone 14 Pro vs iPhone 17 Pro Battery Life & Charging 
iPhone 14 Pro vs iPhone 17 Pro Camera: Is it a HUGE jump?  
Software: iOS 26 on Both  
What About Apple Intelligence?  
Conclusion: Why NOW is the Time to Upgrade    

Thanks for watching! If you have a 14 Pro, let me know your thoughts in the comments.

snippet.title: BEST iPhone 17 Pro Max Case? Torras Ostand O3 Fitness Case Unboxing 🔥📱#iphone
snippet.description:
BEST iPhone 17 Pro Max Case? Torras Ostand O3 Fitness Case Unboxing!

This case offers so much with the integrated Ostand, a magnetic circular stand that rotates 360 degrees. You can place your iPhone in horizontal mode to watch video, and you can also set it in vertical mode to watch short-form content. The vertical stand is also useful to prop it up next to you while you work-- to quickly glance at notifications or take a facetime call. 

Also, the 360 ring stand is magnetic so you can stick your phone to metal surfaces. Additionally, you can use the ring as a pop-socket-style holder to better grip your phone. This Ostand is also great to grab like a clamp from things like the top of a treadmill. Overall I highly recommend it. What do you think?

Disclaimer: I previously did a collab with Torras on the iPhone 16 version of this case. However, this video was NOT sponsored and I purchased this case with my own money.

TORRAS Ostand O3 Fitness - 360 Magnetic Stand for iPhone 17 Pro Max Case: https://amzn.to/4hKCG5G

#apple #iphone17
